The '''construction droid foreman''' was a droid model used c. [[3951 BBY]]. It was more dexterous than the [[ET-74 communications droid|construction droid Mark I]] or [[construction droid Mark II]], having five arms, and was apparently used to supervise the AI of the lesser droids. A typical construction team consisted of one foreman, one Mark II, and multiple Mark I droids.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
